name: Sortable
mdSummary:
# Sortable

Drag-and-drop reorderable list.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Drag & Drop
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/sortable

| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Sortable | Items | `List<TItem>` | `[]` |  |
| Sortable | ItemsChanged | `EventCallback<List<TItem>>` | `` |  |
| Sortable | ItemTemplate | `RenderFragment<TItem>?` | `` |  |
| Sortable | Handle | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Sortable | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Sortable | Group | `string?` | `` |  |
| Sortable | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Sortable | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
